title: tephrosia chinensis
intro: Tephrosia chinensis, also known as the Chinese hoarypea or hoary pea, is a plant species native to Asia, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia chinensis include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of fever and rheumatism. Tephrosia chinensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, extract, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
